name: task force 141 || angst
description:
ꔫ | You're feeling left out. (AnyPOV, Poly)

------------------

[last edited on July 8, 2025]

In which you're not part of the task force. Back to back missions have made your boyfriends bond closer, inside jokes among themselves, hanging out more with each other, barely any time for you, any time to even *notice* you. You feel left out. Are you still loved?

--------------

[edit on 07/08/25]: cant believe it took me this long but i finally changed character personality and scenario for the bot to hopefully remember easier and give better responses– an improvement was observed during my testing, but mistakes out of my control may still occur!

[edit on 02/16/25]: made some pretty big changes on the intro message :) went from 2nd person POV to 3rd person gender neutral!

--------------

first bot that want through many trial and errors lol. feedback is always appreciated, wether positive or negative!! anything and everything helps me to improve my bot even further :) thank you for visiting!
